revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:User in New Zealand]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 340 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{uir
<!-- DO NOT EDIT THE FOLLOWING PARAMETERS SUBSTITUTED FROM [[Template:User New Zealand/par]] -->
|region=New Zealand|adj=New Zealand|demonym=New Zealander
|title='''[[New Zealand]]'''
|background=#FFFFDD
|cres=Wikipedians in New Zealand
|ccit=New Zealand Wikipedians
|canc=New Zealand ancestry Wikipedians
|cint=Wikipedians interested in New Zealand
|cpro=WikiProject New Zealand
|wpm=Wikipedia:WikiProject New Zealand/Members
|update=2019-07-20 02:23 UTC
<!-- DO NOT EDIT THE PRECEDING PARAMETERS SUBSTITUTED FROM [[Template:User New Zealand/par]] -->
<!-- The following are pass-through parameters -->
|option={{{1|1}}}
|activity={{{activity|lives in}}}
|align={{{align|center}}}
|color={{{color|{{{background|#FFFFDD}}}}}}
|float={{{float|left}}}
|info-s={{{info-s|{{#switch:{{{1|1}}}|41|42=7.5|8}}}}}
|res{{#ifeq:{{{res|}}}|{{{res|-}}}||x}}={{{res|}}}
|cit{{#ifeq:{{{cit|}}}|{{{cit|-}}}||x}}={{{cit|}}}
|anc{{#ifeq:{{{anc|}}}|{{{anc|-}}}||x}}={{{anc|}}}
|int{{#ifeq:{{{int|}}}|{{{int|-}}}||x}}={{{int|}}}
|pro{{#ifeq:{{{pro|}}}|{{{pro|-}}}||x}}={{{pro|}}}
|nres{{#ifeq:{{{nres|}}}|{{{nres|-}}}||x}}={{{nres|}}}
|ncit{{#ifeq:{{{ncit|}}}|{{{ncit|-}}}||x}}={{{ncit|}}}
|nocat={{{nocat|false}}}
<!-- The preceding are pass-through parameters -->
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{uir

|region=New Zealand|adj=New Zealand|demonym=New Zealander
|title='''[[New Zealand]]'''
|background=#FFFFDD
|cres=Wikipedians in New Zealand
|ccit=New Zealand Wikipedians
|canc=New Zealand ancestry Wikipedians
|cint=Wikipedians interested in New Zealand
|cpro=WikiProject New Zealand
|wpm=Wikipedia:WikiProject New Zealand/Members
|update=2019-07-20 02:23 UTC

|option={{{1|1}}}
|activity={{{activity|lives in}}}
|align={{{align|center}}}
|color={{{color|{{{background|#FFFFDD}}}}}}
|float={{{float|left}}}
|info-s={{{info-s|{{#switch:{{{1|1}}}|41|42=7.5|8}}}}}
|res{{#ifeq:{{{res|}}}|{{{res|-}}}||x}}={{{res|}}}
|cit{{#ifeq:{{{cit|}}}|{{{cit|-}}}||x}}={{{cit|}}}
|anc{{#ifeq:{{{anc|}}}|{{{anc|-}}}||x}}={{{anc|}}}
|int{{#ifeq:{{{int|}}}|{{{int|-}}}||x}}={{{int|}}}
|pro{{#ifeq:{{{pro|}}}|{{{pro|-}}}||x}}={{{pro|}}}
|nres{{#ifeq:{{{nres|}}}|{{{nres|-}}}||x}}={{{nres|}}}
|ncit{{#ifeq:{{{ncit|}}}|{{{ncit|-}}}||x}}={{{ncit|}}}
|nocat={{{nocat|false}}}

}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
